name: Bell at the Pike
address: 11550 Old Georgetown Road, North Bethesda, MD 20852
doormanNote: Concierge desk on site; building website states 'daily' availability but lists office hours Mon-Fri 10AM-6PM, Sat 10AM-5PM. No evidence of 24-hour staffing.
has2BRor1BRDenNote: 23 distinct 2BR floor plans (989-1,596 sq ft) plus multiple 1BR+den plans (874-942 sq ft).
balconyNote: Many 2BR plans include a balcony; some plans (B2F, B2G, B2H, B2J, B2M, B2P, B2S, B2T) do not. Balcony availability depends on specific unit/plan chosen.
inUnitLaundryNote: All units have an in-home washer and dryer per the building website.
elevatorNote: High-rise with elevators; resident reviews report frequent outages with 2 of 3 elevators regularly out of service.
petFriendlyNote: Cats and dogs welcome; breed restrictions apply.
gymNote: 24/7 fitness center with cardio and strength equipment.
packageRoomNote: Package receiving listed as a service; handled through concierge desk rather than dedicated automated lockers. Resident reviews note historic package theft issues.
unitClimateNote: Rentable.co lists 'central air conditioning'; no source confirms whether thermostats are individually controlled per unit or building-managed.
wellMaintainedNote: Rated 3.6/5 across 130 resident reviews. Recurring complaints: elevators frequently out of service (2 of 3 down at once), packages going missing, concierge staff inconsistent, maintenance staff entering units without notice. Not consistent with a well-maintained building.
bathroomsNote: Almost all 2BR plans are 2 bed/2 bath; only plan B1A is 2 bed/1 bath.
approxRentRange: $2,698-$4,154/month for 2BR (current listings as of June 2026; upper end of listed range reaches $6,600 for premium units)
